settings.heading: Are your products cruelty-free and vegan?
settings.row_content: Yes! Elvara Skin is 100% cruelty-free. We never test on animals, and the majority of our formulas are completely vegan.

settings.heading: Are your products safe for sensitive skin?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. Our products are formulated without parabens, sulfates, and harsh artificial fragrances specifically to be gentle on all skin types, including sensitive skin. However, we always recommend patch-testing new products.

settings.heading: How long does shipping take?
settings.row_content: We process all orders within 24-48 hours. Standard domestic shipping usually takes 3-5 business days, while expedited shipping takes 1-2 business days.

settings.heading: Can I return a product if it doesn't work for me?
settings.row_content: Yes, we offer a 30-Day Glow Guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you can return it within 30 days for a full refund.
